<!-- What recurring problem does this skill solve? Why is it valuable for AI coding agents? -->

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

<!-- What could go wrong? What guards would be needed? -->

## Generality

<!-- Would this skill work across multiple projects, tech stacks, and AI tools? -->

## Prior Art

<!-- Are there existing tools, processes, or articles that inspired this skill? -->

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to write the initial skill specification
- [ ] I would like someone else to write it based on this proposal
